entities.description: teenage boy, slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet hair partly hidden under hood, cautious expression
small gray cat, sleek body, bright eyes, wet fur, expressive face, curled tail
quiet city street at night, heavy rain, puddles reflecting streetlights, narrow sidewalk and shadowy alley entrance

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of the rainy_street at night, heavy rain falling over empty pavement; the boy in a blue raincoat walks alone through puddles, head lowered against the storm.
Closer view near a dark alley entrance; the boy stops and looks down as the gray cat sits under a small awning, soaked but calm, staring directly at him.
Dramatic manga close-up of the cat raising its head with an expressive open mouth and a blank speech bubble shape above it; the boy recoils in surprise, rain streaking between them.

The boy crouches beside the cat and extends one hand gently; the cat steps closer with confident eyes, both framed by glowing puddle reflections and falling rain, creating a mysterious new companionship.
